title: GardenPack
description: Farmers delight, create, gregtech and terrafirmacraft. Will you create the largest kingdom?
body:
# From the stone age to the future. 
This is a realistic modpack themed around farmer's delight and terrafirmacraft. Also has gregtech, create and other mods.

Farm with farmer's delight, but make sure your crops don't die in winter.

Handle your thirst, temperature and diet with terrafirmacraft.

Automate everything with gregtech, create and the create addon named greate

Join the official server, and make an empire there with your knowledge of the modpack after playing singleplayer

Includes mods for servers, like open parties and claims
